title: Thrawn (disambiguation)
content:
'''Thrawn''' may refer to one of the following:

==Canon==
*'''[[Mitth'raw'nuruodo]]''', a [[Chiss]] [[Grand Admiral]] commonly known as '''Thrawn'''

==Legends==
*'''[[Mitth'raw'nuruodo/Legends|Mitth'raw'nuruodo]]''', a [[Chiss/Legends|Chiss]] [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] commonly known as '''Thrawn'''
*'''[[Mitth'raw'nuruodo (clone)]]''', a [[Cloning/Legends|clone]] of the original Thrawn
*'''[[Flim (Human)]]''', a [[Con artist/Legends|con artist]] who impersonated Thrawn

==Non-canon==
*[[Thraawn]], a clone of the original Thrawn.

==Out of universe==
===Canon Media===
*''[[Star Wars: The Imperial Trilogy]]'', often called '''''Star Wars: Thrawn''''', a novel trilogy by [[Timothy Zahn]]
**'''[[Thrawn (novel)|''Thrawn'']]''' {{C|[[Thrawn (audiobook)|audiobook]]}}, the first volume in the series
**'''''[[Thrawn: Alliances]]''''' {{C|[[Thrawn: Alliances (audiobook)|audiobook]]}}, the second volume in the series
**'''''[[Thrawn: Treason]]''''' {{C|[[Thrawn: Treason (audiobook)|audiobook]]}}, the third volume in the series
*'''''[[Star Wars: Thrawn (comic series)|Star Wars: Thrawn]]''''', a canon [[Star Wars comic books|comic book]] miniseries that adapts the novel ''Thrawn''
**'''[[Star Wars: Thrawn (trade paperback)|''Star Wars: Thrawn'']]''', a trade paperback that collects the miniseries
*'''[[Star Wars: Thrawn (manga)|''Star Wars: Thrawn'']]''', a canon manga adaptation of the novel ''Thrawn''
**'''''[[Thrawn, Vol. 1]]''''', the first volume of the ''Thrawn'' manga
*'''''[[Star Wars: Thrawn: Alliances (comic series)|Star Wars: Thrawn: Alliances]]''''', a canon comic book miniseries that adapts the novel ''Thrawn: Alliances''
**'''[[Star Wars: Thrawn: Alliances (trade paperback)|''Star Wars: Thrawn: Alliances'']]''', a trade paperback that collects the ''Thrawn: Alliances'' miniseries
*'''''[[Star Wars: The Ascendancy Trilogy|Star Wars Thrawn: Ascendancy]]''''', a canon novel trilogy by Timothy Zahn
**[[Thrawn Ascendancy: Chaos Rising|'''''Thrawn Ascendancy: Chaos Rising''''']] {{C|[[Thrawn Ascendancy: Chaos Rising (audiobook)|audiobook]]}}, the first volume of the series
**[[Thrawn Ascendancy: Greater Good|'''''Thrawn Ascendancy: Greater Good''''']] {{C|[[Thrawn Ascendancy: Greater Good (audiobook)|audiobook]]}}, the second volume of the series
**[[Thrawn Ascendancy: Lesser Evil|'''''Thrawn Ascendancy: Lesser Evil''''']] {{C|[[Thrawn Ascendancy: Lesser Evil (audiobook)|audiobook]]}}, the third volume of the series

===Legends media===
*'''''[[Star Wars: The Thrawn Trilogy]]''''', a novel trilogy by Timothy Zahn
**'''''[[Heir to the Empire]]''''' {{C|[[Heir to the Empire (unabridged audiobook)|audiobook]]) ([[Heir to the Empire (abridged audiobook)|abridged audiobook]]}}, the first volume of the series
**'''''[[Dark Force Rising]]''''' {{C|[[Dark Force Rising (unabridged audiobook)|audiobook]]) ([[Dark Force Rising (abridged audiobook)|abridged audiobook]]}}, the second volume of the series
**'''''[[The Last Command]]''''' {{C|[[The Last Command (unabridged audiobook)|audiobook]]) ([[The Last Command (abridged audiobook)|abridged audiobook]]}}, the third volume of the series
*'''''[[Star Wars: The Hand of Thrawn Duology|Star Wars: The Hand of Thrawn]]''''', a novel duology by Timothy Zahn
**'''''[[Specter of the Past]]''''' {{C|[[Specter of the Past (unabridged audiobook)|audiobook]]) ([[Specter of the Past (abridged audiobook)|abridged audiobook]]}}, the first volume of the series
**'''''[[Vision of the Future]]''''' {{C|[[Vision of the Future (unabridged audiobook)|audiobook]]) ([[Vision of the Future (abridged audiobook)|abridged audiobook]]}}, the second volume of the series
*'''''[[Star Wars: Heir to the Empire (trade paperback)|Heir to the Empire]]''''', a trade paperback that adapts ''Heir to the Empire''
*'''''[[Star Wars: Dark Force Rising (trade paperback)|Dark Force Rising]]''''', a trade paperback that adapts ''Dark Force Rising''
*'''''[[Star Wars: The Last Command (trade paperback)|The Last Command]]''''', a trade paperback that adapts ''The Last Command''
*'''''[[The Thrawn Trilogy Sourcebook]]''''', collection of roleplaying supplements for ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]''
**'''''[[Heir to the Empire Sourcebook]]''''', first supplement 
**'''''[[Dark Force Rising Sourcebook]]''''', second supplement 
**'''''[[The Last Command Sourcebook]]''''', third supplement

==See also==
*[[Thrawn Trilogy (disambiguation)]]
